resultData.title: Sacrificial Legacy: The Cost of Cosmic Capitalism

game.title: Sacrificial Legacy: The Cost of Cosmic Capitalism
game.short_text: When you get stranded on an alien planet... Some people just gotta die.

details.title: Sacrificial Legacy: The Cost of Cosmic Capitalism
details.description:
After a spacecraft sustains serious damage and crash lands on an unknown planet, only one thing is certain. Some people are going to die. The captain makes an order to start mining the planet for its valuable resources so that the ship can be repaired and you can escape.
There’s only one problem. Spacesuits only have a limited amount of Oxygen, which means that for some crew members, death is inevitable.

Sacrificial Legacy: The Cost of Cosmic Capitalism is a relaxing mining game where death is simply just the start of a new life.

Controls

WASD to move

Mouse to Aim

Left Mouse Button to fire laser

Right Mouse button to use grappling Hook

Left Shift to cooldown laser faster

Spacebar to Dash


If playing the Web build, try making it full screen to avoid any UI scaling issues.

Made in a week by Adam Womersley, Sam Barnsby and Joel Mann for the Brackeys 2023.1 Game Jam with the theme: An end is a new beginning.

NOW AVAILABLE ON PLAY STORE!

This isometric puzzle game will test your thinking skills!  The movement takes some time to get used to, but you can use WASD or the arrow keys. You start on the green tile and need to collect all coins in order to turn it into the yellow goal tile. game.title: ouroboros
game.short_text: Traverse around obstacles and eat civilians in this slithery puzzle game!

details.title: ouroboros
details.description:
WASD to move, R to restart
DescriptionYou are an ouroboros who loves to eat your own tail! You also LOVE eating people!
But there are obstacles in your way...
Traverse around barriers and eat snacks (civilians) on your journey to your tail in this slithery top-down puzzle game.

game.title: The Saikidou Incident
game.short_text: Stop a catastrophic incident from destroying the Saikidou facility

details.title: The Saikidou Incident
details.description:
------------------------------------------------------
[NOTE] There are numerous issues with the in-browser version of the game. The best way to play is to download an executable for your OS; if you do prefer the web build, however, we advise you not to fullscreen. There's also a walkthrough below for your convenience. Thanks for playing!
------------------------------------------------------
The Saikidou Incident is a puzzle game where you must stop a catastrophic incident from destroying the Saikidou facility.  Explore the facility, interact with your coworkers to gain clues, and experience some strange effects of the facility's futuristic… pills?
This game was created for Brackey's Game Jam 2023.1
Controls:
MoveWASDJumpSpaceCrouchCInteractLMB
Walkthrough [SPOILERS]:


Key card:
1. Buy a burger before the shop closes
2. After the shop closes, give the guy nearby the burger
3. Go to the beach room and buy a drink
4. Give the guy on the beach the drink


Pass code:
1. Talk to the guy in the bathroom to learn a code
2. Enter the janitor's closet and sneak into the mainframe room
3. Cancel the manager's meeting before 2:00
4. Talk to the manager to learn an employee's name
5. Find out where that employee sits
6. Read the passcode at their desk when they aren't there (meeting isn't cancelled)

game.title: Give A Soul
game.short_text: Build your successor and get the highest score possible

details.title: Give A Soul
details.description:
This game was made for the Brackeys Game Jam of 2023 with the theme : An End is a new Beginning 

GOAL :
You have to build your successor piece by piece before you die.
Collect PARTS one by one and THROW THEM AROUND to your DESK to build him.
You will die and give your soul to his body so you can keep on living for as long as possible.
There are 8 types of levels, full of traps for you to die a lot!
Have fun but keep in mind this game is HARD, so be prepared!
CONTROLS
WASD  /  Arrow Keys : Move (Arrow keys recommended)
Space : Pick Up / Throw a PART.
Escape : Open Pause Menu

game.title: For The Church
game.short_text: Sacrifice your people for the greater good

details.title: For The Church
details.description:
~ For The Church ~

Context
For The Church is my submission for the Brackeys Game JAM 2023 with the them "An end is a new beginning".
It was made in 72 hours.


Gameplay
What ?
You're playing a paladin and your goal is to defend the holy shrine in the middle of your village.
Every night, demons will swarm towards the shrine, kill them. 
How ?
During the day, slaughter sacrifice the villagers and collect their souls. Collecting souls will empower the shrine, leading you to unlock blessings. These various blessings will give you enough power to defeat the enemy.
Until ?
Survive through the 15th night to win.

Inputs
For The Church only supports keyboard.
Move around with W A S D
Select blessings with your Mouse
Playing the game within the browser may lead to some bugs.
For more stability, you may download and launch the windows installer.

details.description:
Controls  :

Movement - WASD or Arrow Keys

Jump - Spacebar

Run - Left Shift

Interact - E or Z

Restart - R 
Pause - Esc

Wait I Was There Two Seconds Ago is a speedrunning game, where you replay the same level over and over, but with a different twist each time! 
The game contains 20 unique levels.
Try your best to beat your best time! You can share your record down in the discussion board.
Are you going to be able to beat the devs' best time?This game was made entirely within a time span of two days for Brakeys Game Jam 2023.1 , by a team of 4!

game.title: Dungeon of Possession
game.short_text: A strategic 2D bullet-hell game for Brackey's Jam 2023.1

details.title: Dungeon of Possession
details.description:
NOTE: Please read mechanic explanation to avoid confusion.
Post your high scores pic in the comment of this page, and I will manually update it on this page.
LORE: A lot of dungeons are popping up mystically around the world. The wizard society steps up to the challenge and vows to conquer them all. They send battle wizards to each dungeon, however no matter how many they send in, be it one at a time or all at once, only one wizard survives. Those survivors all share the same story - everyone else died, except one, who wielded their magic against the survivors, as if he/she was possessed.
Control wizards to conquer the dungeons, while minimizing the casualties as much as possible. Challenge different difficulties, clear them as fast as possible and your score will be featured on this very page!
-----
CONTROLS:
WASD / Movement arrow keys to move around.
Use mouse to aim.
Left Click to shoot.
ESC to pause.
SPACE to either proceed to the next room, or spawn enemies to challenge.
-----
MECHANIC EXPLANATION:
Top right is your sanity bar. It will drain over time while you are fighting.
Top left is your health bar. Taking a hit reduces some health.
When either bar is depleted, you will faint. The dungeon room will take control of that wizard, inheriting all the upgrades you have collected for that wizard. You'll control a new and different wizard with base stats.
When either bar is depleted while battling in the room where the possession took place, you will be destroyed - because the room could only possess once.
A dungeon consists of multiple rooms, therefore plan your sacrifices and strategies to minimize casualties.
-----
LIST OF POWERUPS:
Red: damage up.
Purple: increases fireballs summoned by 1.
Cyan: increases fireballs' speed.
Yellow: increases fire rate.
Green: restores some hp.
Grey: increases movement speed.
BIG ORB: Spawns from a dying wizard. Holds all the powerups of the previous owner.
-----
HIGHSCORE:
HARD MODE - Mio

-----
CREDITS:
Graphics:
Base tiles and characters are from https://0x72.itch.io/dungeontileset-ii, with some adjustments and additions by Vi.
Music:
All found via BGM DOVA-SYNDROME OFFICIAL YouTube CHANNEL.
Artist is "フリー". Very pog music that is free to use.
8-bit Aggressive1 @ フリー . Link: www.youtube.com/watch?v=FSG03LjNsiU.
Will you still cry? @ フリー . Link: www.youtube.com/watch?v=7Z4fjyA--_w.情動カタルシス @ フリー . Link: www.youtube.com/watch?v=9EOavqZG6mA.和テイスト @ フリー . Link: www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ls55uJx9Ne0.Aggression @ フリー . Link: www.youtube.com/watch?v=hXgWVFOKNTw.Download, unzip and then launch the Dungeons of Possession.exe file.

moreInfo.Author: Yuuni
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Bullet Hell, Speedrun, Top down shooter

game.title: Such Is Lives
game.short_text: A darkly funny game about reincarnation.

details.title: Such Is Lives
details.description:
You have died and been sent to the afterlife.
Due to your actions as a human, you have been sentenced to eternal reincarnation...as things that die easily.
It's always just a matter of time before you perish and reincarnate again.
Gameplay
Such Is Lives is a minigame collection where in each minigame, you play as a specific animal.
These minigames range from cleaning up sloppily eaten kibble as a dog to trying to stay in the air as a bird!
And if you lose any of the minigames, you die. No questioning it, you're dead.
However, you may choose to reincarnate and play as a different creature, with an entirely new set of minigames. They're all equally as likely to kill you and hopefully equally as funny!
Though, you will wanna do well at these minigames. For each minigame you beat in one life, you get a little time boost during the next life. This may not seem like much, but remember, numbers add up.
Playing the WebGL build is HIGHLY recommended, however I'll still include download instructions if for some reason the WebGL build doesn't work.
Step 1: Click Download.
Step 2: Right click on the file.
Step 3: Click "Extract to folder" or something along those lines.
Step 4: Open the new folder
Step 5: Click SuchIsLives.exe and enjoy!

game.title: Dwor
game.short_text: An Arcade Word Puzzle

details.title: Dwor
details.description:
I was inspired by the growth of wordle to create a word game. I made it as a part of Brackeys Game Jam 2023.1. However, I only could work on it for 2 days out of the 7. Overall I'm happy with the results but I feel like it could be more polished. The UI is spaced weirdly because it went weird when I built the version but I didn't have the time to fix it.
The rules of the game are simple. The end of a word is the start of the next but you can't have repeating words. The aim is to get the highest score possible, enjoy!

game.title: The Loop Labs™
game.short_text: A short platforming game with some interesting mechanics.

details.title: The Loop Labs™
details.description:
Welcome to The Loop Labs™.
Your job here is simple. Test the robots, complete the test facility. Good luck.
*The Loop Labs is not responsible for any damage to you, your life, or your mental.
Game InfoThe Loop Labs™ is a platformer with two main gimmicks:When your character dies, their body remains.When your character dies, they get a random modifier and an ability.The game is a simple (but rage inducing) platformer centered around these two mechanics. And they tie to the Game Jam's theme (an end is a new beginning).The aesthetics were originally inspired by Valve's Portal, but it didn't turn out to be too similar.I had a lot of fun making the game. Even though it's short, it's probably my best game work yet.Jam InfoThis game was made in around 5 days for Brackeys Game Jam 2023.This game was made solo.CreditsThank you so much for playing!
used external assets:
minish (by me) @ telif.itch.io/minish
adve (ground textures, edited) @ egordorichev.itch.io/adveeverything else drawn/composed by me
special thanks to @twentybruh for playtesting & suggestions!and special thanks to Brackeys for the amazing tutorials, and continuing on these awesome Game Jams.

moreInfo.Tags: 2D, 8-Bit, Atmospheric, Indie, Pixel Art, Singleplayer, Unity

game.title: The Experiment
game.short_text: Ranked 55th in Brackeys Game Jam 2023.1

details.title: The Experiment
details.description:
The Experiment

You incarnate a shapeshifting mutant, sent in rooms to solve puzzles.
Death is not a problem to you as long as you have your egg, and biomass to respawn.
Who created you? What's your goal? That's a whole other story.

Controls
W/A/S/D - MoveR - RestartESC - Main menuQ - Lay eggSpace - Spit (Worm)

Credits
Made in 7 days for the Brackeys Game Jam 2023.1 Ranked #55 Overall and #4 Theme over 728 with 35 votes, I didn't except that! Thanks a lot.
It is my very first game, I tried to make it as bugless as possible. All kind of feedback are welcomed!
Tileset by Aske4 ("Free space tileset" edited for my needs)Music by LodoLoon Studio ("Save/Pause Menu" & "Puzzled Mind")SFX by Kronbits ("200 Free SFX")
Known issues
- Sometimes when you hit a bullet, it kills you but the respawn isn't triggered.
Devlog
Day 1: Brainstorm with people on figma, takes me a couple of hour to find a very clear idea of what I'm gonna do: a puzzle game where you play a mutant that can respawn from its "egg" when it dies and choose between different forms, used to solve the puzzles
Day 2: Spent half the day on choosing assets, learning libresprite and learning the auto tile system from Godot.
Spent more the other half trying to make a grid move system by myself, then try it with a tutorial that I couldn't understand, tried again alone, and called it a day.
Day 3: In a couple of hours I finally understood the tutorial, and realize it's very archaic and not flexible. Find another tutorial and decides to give it a go the next day.
Day 4: Starting the new tutorial using ray cast, and it seems to be exactly what I need. Now I can move forward. Implemented crates, plates, movement animations. Created some UI, main menu and level selector templates. It's ugly, but it'll be functionnal. Made some more tiles to cover all the cases.
Day 5: Reworked a bit my sprites. Made some more UI. Implemented ressource system & death. Took me much more time than expected, but now it's done. Got myself entangled in ray cast, collision and signals, but I understand it all better now! I'm trying to make the respawn before going to bed.
Day 6: Got collisions to work early in the morning. Made turrets shoot bullets that can kill the player properly. Tweaked it again the next day.
Day 7: Mostly bug fixes & level design. Finished the assets. Added some music & sfx. Submitted the game.
Day 8: Fix bug (see Patch 1), added banner & setup the itch page.

moreInfo.Author: Cortez
moreInfo.Tags: My First Game Jam, Top-Down

game.short_text: A  passive platforming adventure for Brackeys Game Jam 2023.1.

details.title: Spore Story
details.description:
Spore Story is a passive platforming adventure for Brackeys Game Jam 2023.1.
Reach new heights as you journey onward, from one life to the next, as a mushroom spore floating in the wind. 
Use rich soil, streams, and wind to launch high and spread far, avoiding rocks, sand, lava, and other obstacles along the way. 
A collaborative effort with The Doc, L4zyL30, jessplusplus, and MachineFossil.

Rotate Camera (Post-Jam Build): Right Stick
Rotate Camera (Jam Build): LR Trigger / LR Bumper
Reset: Select





Thanks for playing!

game.title: Ages in a day
game.short_text: Can you advance from prehistory to modern age in a single day?

details.title: Ages in a day
details.description:
AGES IN A DAY
Strategy, resource-management game. Place buildings to produce resources required to advance to the next Age and to make more buildings.
At the end of every day, all buildings disappear and the planet goes back to Prehistory. Luckily you keep all your resources, so you can advance a bit faster than before...
Reach the age that has sufficient technology to build a spaceship to get you out of the evil loop! Can you gather enough resources to rush through all ages before the sun sets?

Gameplay tips:
• Advancing costs a lot of resources, don't advance near the end of a day because the age will be reset soon.• You can spend a whole day just farming a single resource (cover your planet in wood-producers and wait for the day to end to stack up on wood).• Make sure to stack up on early-age resources before trying to advance further.• Don't waste your resources on advancing to new ages if you know you won't have enough to build anything there.• A building placed earlier will have more time to produce before it disappears.
Code by @Exarpo.Art by @QueenDragon.(Some music & sound effects from https://pixabay.com/).

game.title: unSentenced
game.short_text: A journey through an enigmatic monologue.

details.title: unSentenced
details.description:
A journey through an enigmatic monologue. Take on the role of a centipede, slinking through a dark and ominous landscape of words from an unsentenced man, in search of full-stops as if its very existence depends on it. But as you grow with each dot you devour, danger lurks between the lines. 
Enter a terrifying world where every end is a new beginning. 

To avoid hazardous dots and text, you must use your quick reflexes, while also reading the text and predicting where danger may arise. Will you prevail and devour the dots, or will you succumb to the ominous abyss of words that surrounds you? 

The theme of the Game Jam was “An end is a new Beginning”. In our approach we brainstormed around the idea of the theme, while eliminating from the beginning the obvious rebirth concepts with different abilities and/or controls. In the matter of video gaming “An end is a new Beginning” theme, represents mainly Dungeon Crawlers types of games as well as the iconic Baba is You (if the theme is read appropriately). In our approach, we concluded upon the full-stops which define an end in a sentence and the beginning of a new one. As the game evolved during this one-week development journey, we included as mechanics for all three options for punctuating the end of a sentence; a period “.”, an exclamation mark “!” and a question mark “?” . Each punctuation mark devoured by our protagonist, the centipede, acts as a new body - a new life, a dangerous obstacle or something different that we don’t want to spoil it for you yet. Reading the monologue the player has to decide upon eating the punctuations.  The UI implements the idea of the theme as continuous Experience, with smooth transitions between the Main Menu, the Game and back.

Minas - Game Development
Yannis - Game Design
Andreas - VFX
Mike - Game-breaker | Swiss Army Knife
Konstantina - Sound Design
Mihalis - Gameplay Develepoment
Anna - Gameplay Mechanics
Yorgos - Best Boy | QA
Birbilo the cat - Couch heater | CuddlingFrom all of us, thanks for stopping by! 
Cheers!
Created for Brackeys 2023.1 Game Jam

game.title: Nova Blossom
game.short_text: Find solitude in sending a flower into a supernova to be reborn anew.

details.title: Nova Blossom
details.description:
Grow then kill the blossoms in a supernova to unlock abilities and plant new blossoms in order to cover the entire level in vines. A short puzzle game meant to invoke the wonder and quite solitude of death and rebirth - to strive towards a goal larger than a single life.
Instructions
1. Grow the vines of a Nova Blossoms by selecting one, then clicking the direction you want to grow in. Each vine can only grow from the tip of the vine or from any four sides of the Blossom.
2. Your goal is to take over the map up to the required vine coverage, shown in the top left of the screen.
3. Each blossom can only grow 9 vines. Your remaining vines are in the top center of the screen.
4. In Grow Mode, route your vines next to Water Tiles to grow your Blossom, adding new actions to use when it dies. The Mode is shown in the top left.
5. At any time, you can Supernova your Blossom by clicking on the vine counter in the top center of the screen. This will kill the Blossom and change the game to 'Nova Mode'.
6. In Nova mode, you can use the abilities that were gained during Grow Mode. You must either use or discard each action before returning to Grow Mode. Abilities include:
Plant Seed (Red, Blue, Purple) on a Fertile Ground Tile. The seed color is the same as the Blossom that just died.Set Fire to a dead vine, destroying it, to take make room for another vine to grow. Only Red Nova Blossoms offer this ability.Convert a Fertile Ground Tile to a new Water Tile. Only Blue Nova Blossoms offer this ability.Create a new Fertile Ground Tile. Only Purple Nova Blossoms offer this ability.
=====================
This game was made by bricabrac in ~40 hours over the week long Brackeys 2023.1 Game Jam. The theme of the jam was "An End is a New Beginning". All art, programming, and music was created by bricabrac. Sound Effects from owned/purchased from Epic Stock Media.

Bug: When using "I" to bring up the information menu, you will need to press "I" twice.

game.title: New Paths, Old Enemies
game.short_text: A little fox on a journey meets an old enemy, a wolf.

details.title: New Paths, Old Enemies
details.description:
Note: You can use the tree's branches for platforming.Summary
In New Paths, Old Enemies, the theme 'an end is a new beginning' is embodied in the journey of the little fox, who must overcome an old enemy in order to continue its adventure and discover new paths. The game showcases the idea that in order to move forward, we must sometimes bring an end to old conflicts and challenges, and embrace new opportunities and experiences.-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Keys
AD or Right/Left: Movement
Space: Jump
W or Up: Enter the tree and journey through the seasons!
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Story
Join a little fox on a journey of self-discovery and adventure in a vast and beautiful forest. But beware, as old enemies lurk in the shadows, seeking to block your path and halt your progress.
In New Paths, Old Enemies, you'll guide the little fox through a series of challenging levels filled with obstacles and puzzles. Along the way, you'll encounter new friends, explore hidden areas, and overcome dangerous enemies, including the wolf, a menacing foe that the fox has battled with in the past.

With its evocative art style, immersive sound design, and compelling storyline, New Paths, Old Enemies is a game that will transport you to a world of wonder and excitement. Will you help the little fox overcome its old enemies and discover new paths to adventure? The journey is yours to embark upon.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spoiler
To complete the level, you need to follow these steps:

Move the log over the river during the winter season.
Use the branches to navigate through the forest and reach the wolf.
Break the branch on top of the wolf's head.
Sleep until spring to kill the wolf with ice on top of it.
Sleep until winter to turn the wolf into a skeleton.
Finally, exit the level.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

game.title: Meowrlin's Nine Lives
game.short_text: Made for the Brackeys Game Jam 2023 in 7 days, with the theme "An end is a New Beginning".

details.title: Meowrlin's Nine Lives
details.description:
Story:
Meowrlin, the legendary and powerful cat, had fallen victim to theft. His precious ball of yarn had been stolen by a mysterious thief, and Meowrlin desperately needed to retrieve it. After exploring every nook and cranny of his house, he realized that this time he had to turn to a darker and more mysterious source to solve the mystery: Meowldemor.
Meowrlin knew that this mission would not be easy, and he prepared carefully. He used his flying cushion to soar over the plains and mountains, avoiding ground-level dangers. With his feline strength and nine lives at his paw's reach, he braved violent winds and storms to finally reach the entrance of the Dark litterbox of Death, Meowldemor's lair.

The interior was dark and eerie, and menacing shadows danced on the walls. Meowrlin slipped in with skill and used his wit to avoid the traps of the Dark litterbox of Death. He advanced slowly, knowing that every step could be his last.

About the game:
You are Meowrlin, a legendary cat with nine lives and incredible powers. Your mission is to defeat your enemies, survive and get powerful upgrades as you navigate through the 9-minute levels. Will you be able to make it through all the levels and emerge victorious?
Credit:

Veyle at in game Music
Shoutout to Walt for sharing concepts arts ideas, and Kyuzen for communication.
Download the zip file, extract it and click on the Nine Lives executable

details.title: Final Verdict
details.description:
⚠ If the WebGL is causing lag/framerate issues, please consider installing the windows executable. Thank You ✨
Let justice be done, though heaven falls
Court’s in session! You’re eager to start at your new job as judge of spirits between the realms of the passed and the afterlife. You’ll be handing out final verdicts for these people’s new beginnings based on past memories. Your boss gives you the creeps though, he seems to be busy all the time.

This mystery / sorting game will keep you on your toes to find out more pieces of information as you begin to question morality. Accompanied by cute graphics and different variety of musical tracks this - maybe not so wholesome story - truly comes to life as you stop and start questioning the way things are handled in this courtroom.

details.title: Menagerie
details.description:
Welcome to the Menagerie. We have been waiting for you.
Sound On. 






Controls

WASD = Move

SHIFT = Run
TAB + ARROW KEYS = Sing
LEFT CLICK = Interact

RIGHT CLICK = Scroll Dialogue




Credits

Skyler Zartman - Programmer/Artist

Jen Loefstedt - Creature Artist

Sean Smeed - Producer/Composer/Audio Design

game.title: House Out of Time
game.short_text: Fix up an old foreclosed house to give it a new beginning! Clean, repair, and decorate the rooms long out of fashion.

details.title: House Out of Time
details.description:
***The web version will not load on Mac***
There is a bug in Godot 4 breaking Mac HTML5 support. There is a windows version available that should be playable with the Itch app if Wine is installed system wide.

Fix up an old foreclosed house to give it a new beginning! 
Clean, repair, and decorate the rooms long out of fashion. Learn more about the former owners through what they left behind including music they've made. 

Featuring 3 original songs, a radio drama, a food advice show, and more! 
Travel out of time and into the 1890s, the 1930s, and the 1980s. 



Sorry for any inconvenience! 

Jason Rand - Programming, UX, Jack
Catherine Rand - Art

DanzMacabre - Music, SFX, Various Voices

Jillian Wagner - Story,  Various Voices, SFX
Art was made in part with Stable Diffusion
"A Long Dame's Journey Into Night" written in part by ChatGPT and edited by Jillian Wagner

moreInfo.Tags: Arcade, Music

game.title: Campus

details.title: Campus
details.description: Controls[LEFT CLICK] to select a card, and then again to place the building onto the board.[RIGHT CLICK] to rotate the selected building[LEFT CLICK] and DRAG to pan view camera.[RIGHT CLICK] and DRAG to rotate view camera.

game.title: Miles From Home
game.short_text: Tomorrow may not be ahead.

details.title: Miles From Home
details.description:
Miles from Home is an intimate story about moving, travel, and transformation, that takes the shape of a lonely night trip through the freeways of Los Angeles. 
The player takes the driver’s seat in an old 1970s Buick, taking the role of a man on his way to LAX Airport to leave the city of Los Angeles for good. The road to the airport will be paved with memories, second thoughts, and reflections, exploring the relationship between our lives and the places we inhabit, what does it mean to leave one's house and possessions, and the emotional toll that moving to a different city can take on someone.
--------------------------------------
Made for Brackeys Game Jam 2023.1
Game Design: Daniel Chernov
Narrative: Luciano Salerno
Voice: Drew McGee
--------------------------------------
Unzip the folder and run Miles From Home.exe

moreInfo.Tags: 3D, Atmospheric, First-Person, Game Jam, Narrative, Singleplayer, Story Rich, Unity

game.title: Wrappa-Ball
game.short_text: Plinko meets Pong with a physics-based, endless arcade twist!

details.title: Wrappa-Ball
details.description:
Wrappa-Ball
Using your trusty paddle, wack the ball into enemies without touching them yourself! Hit the ball against the edges of the screen to send it flying out the other side! How long will you survive in this physics-based arcade game!
Made for the Brackeys 2023.1 Game Jam. The theme was "An end is a new beginning".
Controls
Click / Tap & Drag on the paddle to move it around on the screen
Works on Mobile as well!
Attributions
Font: Arco - dafont.com
Background Music: Shady Dave Ambient Loop - freesound.org
Sound Effects: Kenny Impact Sounds, Kenny Casino Audio

moreInfo.Author: JoshuaPelican
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Arcade, Endless, Physics
